news.title: 3-Year-Old Girl Raped By School Staff In Delhi; Accused Granted Bail
news.excerpt: A three-year-old girl was allegedly raped by a 57-year-old staff member inside a private school in west Delhi's Janakpuri area, police said on Friday.
